title: Highlighter
description: Highlights items in your inventory different colors depending on their enchantments and types.
body:
Highlights items in your inventory different colors depending on their enchantments (ex. piercing vs multishot) or type (ex. totems)
### as goes with anything, do not download this from anywhere but the official source (this page)
![Showcases all currently highlighted items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xc8SNPzT/images/2b07119c94274f2e691ae55d459a9d8d5b7c38b5.png)
